requirement_topic.en: IANORQ EMC — Electromagnetic Compatibility Conformity Assessment
requirement_topic.zh: IANORQ电磁兼容性（EMC）符合性评估
requirement_topic.zht: IANORQ電磁相容性（EMC）符合性評估

summary.en: IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalização e Qualidade) oversees national standards and conformity assessment in Angola. Wireless and IoT devices may be subject to IANORQ electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) assessment requirements, referencing international standards (IEC/CISPR series) adapted for the Angolan market. IANORQ conformity certificates may be required alongside INACOM homologação for market access. Documentation must be in Portuguese.
summary.zh: IANORQ（安哥拉标准化和质量研究所）负责安哥拉的国家标准和符合性评估。无线和物联网设备可能须遵守IANORQ电磁兼容性（EMC）评估要求，参照针对安哥拉市场适配的国际标准（IEC/CISPR系列）。市场准入可能需要IANORQ符合性证书与INACOM设备认证并行。文件须以葡萄牙语提供。
summary.zht: IANORQ（安哥拉標準化和質量研究所）負責安哥拉的國家標準和符合性評估。無線和物聯網裝置可能須遵守IANORQ電磁相容性（EMC）評估要求，參照針對安哥拉市場適配的國際標準（IEC/CISPR系列）。市場准入可能需要IANORQ符合性證書與INACOM設備認證並行。文件須以葡萄牙語提供。

standards_or_laws: IEC/CISPR series (EMC limits — adopted by reference)

summary.en: China mandates EMC compliance under GB 9254 (radio disturbance) and GB/T 17626 series (immunity) for IT and telecommunications equipment. CCC certification covers EMC for products in its scope. SRRC type approval test reports include radiated and conducted emission measurements per applicable GB standards.
summary.zh: 中国强制要求信息技术和电信设备依据GB 9254（无线电骚扰）和GB/T 17626系列（抗扰度）满足电磁兼容性要求。CCC认证涵盖范围内产品的EMC。SRRC型式核准测试报告包含依据适用GB标准的辐射和传导发射测量。
summary.zht: 中國強制要求資訊技術和電信設備依據GB 9254（無線電騷擾）和GB/T 17626系列（抗擾度）滿足電磁相容性要求。CCC認證涵蓋範圍內產品的EMC。SRRC型式核准測試報告包含依據適用GB標準的輻射和傳導發射測量。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 — Information technology equipment radio disturbance limits
SRRC type approval — includes emission measurements

gap.en: Chinese GB EMC certificates and CCC marks are not directly recognised by IANORQ. Angola EMC conformity may require separate IANORQ assessment or submission of IEC/CISPR-based test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Scope and procedures should be confirmed with IANORQ directly, as the framework is still developing.
gap.zh: 中国GB EMC证书和CCC标志不被IANORQ直接认可。安哥拉EMC符合性可能需要另行进行IANORQ评估，或提交来自ILAC认可实验室基于IEC/CISPR标准的测试报告。由于框架仍在发展中，相关范围和程序应直接向IANORQ确认。
gap.zht: 中國GB EMC證書和CCC標誌不被IANORQ直接認可。安哥拉EMC符合性可能需要另行進行IANORQ評估，或提交來自ILAC認可實驗室基於IEC/CISPR標準的測試報告。由於框架仍在發展中，相關範圍和程序應直接向IANORQ確認。

source.publisher: IANORQ — Instituto Angolano de Normalização e Qualidade

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB EMC certifications and CCC marks are not automatically accepted by IANORQ. Exporters should confirm current IANORQ EMC assessment requirements and submit IEC/CISPR-based ILAC-accredited test reports in Portuguese where required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB EMC认证和CCC标志不被IANORQ自动接受。出口商应确认IANORQ现行EMC评估要求，并在需要时以葡萄牙语提交基于IEC/CISPR标准的ILAC认可实验室测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB EMC認證和CCC標誌不被IANORQ自動接受。出口商應確認IANORQ現行EMC評估要求，並在需要時以葡萄牙語提交基於IEC/CISPR標準的ILAC認可實驗室測試報告。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Spectrum — 5 GHz Indoor Restriction and Frequency Allocation
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频谱——5 GHz室内限制及频率分配
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻譜——5 GHz室內限制及頻率分配

summary.en: INACOM regulates radio frequency spectrum in Angola. Use of the 5 GHz band (particularly 5150–5350 MHz) is restricted to indoor use only. Devices transmitting in restricted outdoor 5 GHz sub-bands without approval may not receive INACOM homologação. Frequency allocations follow ITU Region 1 (Africa) and may differ from Chinese domestic allocations. DFS (Dynamic Frequency Selection) may be required for certain 5 GHz channels.
summary.zh: INACOM负责管理安哥拉的无线电频率频谱。5 GHz频段（特别是5150–5350 MHz）的使用仅限于室内。在未经批准的情况下于受限室外5 GHz子频段发射的设备可能无法获得INACOM设备认证。频率分配遵循国际电信联盟第1区（非洲）规定，可能与中国国内分配有所不同。某些5 GHz信道可能需要DFS（动态频率选择）功能。
summary.zht: INACOM負責管理安哥拉的無線電頻率頻譜。5 GHz頻段（特別是5150–5350 MHz）的使用僅限於室內。在未經批准的情況下於受限室外5 GHz子頻段發射的裝置可能無法獲得INACOM設備認證。頻率分配遵循國際電信聯盟第1區（非洲）規定，可能與中國國內分配有所不同。某些5 GHz信道可能需要DFS（動態頻率選擇）功能。

standards_or_laws: ITU Radio Regulations — Region 1 frequency allocations (Africa)

summary.en: China's SRRC type approval and frequency allocation framework (MIIT) governs 5 GHz Wi-Fi use under China domestic allocations. China also applies 5150–5250 MHz indoor-only restrictions. SRRC approval specifies approved frequency bands; devices must operate within those bands in China.
summary.zh: 中国SRRC型式核准及频率分配框架（工信部）依据中国国内分配规范管理5 GHz Wi-Fi使用。中国同样对5150–5250 MHz频段实施仅限室内限制。SRRC批准规定了许可频段；设备在中国境内须在该频段范围内工作。
summary.zht: 中國SRRC型式核准及頻率分配框架（工信部）依據中國國內分配規範管理5 GHz Wi-Fi使用。中國同樣對5150–5250 MHz頻段實施僅限室內限制。SRRC批准規定了許可頻段；設備在中國境內須在該頻段範圍內工作。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — frequency band specification

gap.en: Angola follows ITU Region 1 (Africa) spectrum allocations which may differ from Chinese domestic (ITU Region 3) allocations, particularly for certain 5 GHz sub-bands. Devices must be verified against Angola/ITU Region 1 channel plans. Chinese SRRC approval covering Region 3 channels does not automatically satisfy Angola's Region 1 requirements.
gap.zh: 安哥拉遵循国际电信联盟第1区（非洲）频谱分配，可能与中国国内（ITU第3区）分配有所不同，尤其是某些5 GHz子频段。设备须依据安哥拉/ITU第1区信道规划进行核验。涵盖第3区信道的中国SRRC批准不自动满足安哥拉第1区要求。
gap.zht: 安哥拉遵循國際電信聯盟第1區（非洲）頻譜分配，可能與中國國內（ITU第3區）分配有所不同，尤其是某些5 GHz子頻段。裝置須依據安哥拉/ITU第1區信道規劃進行核驗。涵蓋第3區信道的中國SRRC批准不自動滿足安哥拉第1區要求。

source.publisher: INACOM — Instituto Nacional das Comunicações de Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC 5 GHz approval covers China domestic (ITU Region 3) channel plans and does not automatically satisfy Angola INACOM spectrum requirements under ITU Region 1. Device frequency bands, DFS capability, and indoor-use restrictions must be verified against Angola allocations before homologação submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC 5 GHz批准涵盖中国国内（ITU第3区）信道规划，不自动满足安哥拉INACOM在ITU第1区下的频谱要求。在提交INACOM设备认证申请前，须依据安哥拉频率分配核验设备频段、DFS功能及室内使用限制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC 5 GHz批准涵蓋中國國內（ITU第3區）信道規劃，不自動滿足安哥拉INACOM在ITU第1區下的頻譜要求。在提交INACOM設備認證申請前，須依據安哥拉頻率分配核驗裝置頻段、DFS功能及室內使用限制。
